DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jessica Ehsandan, Esq. (415-675-3469) for Bank of America , N.A., Reconstruct Company, N.A., defendant and moving party / Tiffany Norman, Esq. (415-823-4566) for Mary Shelby, plaintiff and opposing party

HEARING - Discussion re the tentative ruling is held. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address all issues raised in demurrer. Specifically applicability of CCC 2923.5, facts showing loss of money or property, etc. Late-filed opposition is stricken. C. Scott Greene, Andrea M. Hicks, Thomas S. Lee, Jessica T. Ehsanian and Bryan Cave, LLP are ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in future. Order is signed in open court. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar - First Amended Complaint filed March 5, 2013. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported. (501)
